title: Cobblemon XP Lock
description: A fabric server-sided mod allowing players to lock XP gains from battles for specific Pokemon
body: # Cobblemon XP Lock A Fabric server-sided mod allowing you to lock XP gain from battles for specific Pokemon in your party! More information on configuration can be found on the Wiki (coming soon) ## Features - Command to lock and unlock XP gaining - Customizable messages - Customizable ID used to lock (backward compatibility for other mods) ## Installation 1. Download the latest version of the mod from the Releases tab. 2. Download all required dependencies: - [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) 3. Install the mod and dependencies into your server's `mods` folder. 4. Configure the mods settings in the `./config/cobblemonxplock/` folder. ## Commands/Permissions | Command | Description | Permission | |-----------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------| | /xplock | Lock/unlock XP gaining for the Pokemon in the specified party slot | cobblemonxplock.command.base | | /xplock reload | Reload the Mod | cobblemonxplock.command.reload | | /xplock debug | Toggle the debug mode for more insight into errors | cobblemonxplock.command.debug | ## Planned Features - Need suggestions! ## Donations This mod was developed as part of the Skies Development goal of **providing free, high quality, and open sourced mods** for the Cobblemon and Fabric communities! If you are able to support this mission, **please consider making a one-time donation or becoming a Member** on [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/stampede2011). Being a member gives you early access to all new mods as well as helping decide on the development direction. During this mods development, the following people supported Skies Development through an active Membership: **Jephon, Vince, GriffinFluff, Samu (Fraternidade Gamer), AllieDragon, FrostEffects, SPG, Liopo, Mikirae, YnohtnaUwU, Jaackla, Ryqx, TheWickening, Galaxyminer01, TrainerMarkyMark, SalamanderMan, Skyy, Puff, Trizma, Lotus, TM27, Zama, hotdamnitsaaron, Zephyr, EasyKillin, Sakaii, Llama, skeletan, TPB2, zion, Chae, Mouse, Yalu, Drakeoh, and Drift**. Thank you for your generosity! ❤️ ## Support A community support Discord has been opened up for all Skies Development related projects! Feel free to join and ask questions or leave suggestions :)
